description: 12andus is an astrology service that provides personalized chart readings, forecasts, relationship analysis, and AI-assisted astrology features. Its public site focuses on consumer astrology content and reports.
summary: 12andus.com exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server for astrology access at `https://mcp.12andus.com/mcp/?v=10`; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
